creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is a new patch:
http://people.freebsd.org/~romain/mono-2.10.1_2.diff

  - An new version of boo is available, but monodevelop-boo fails to
    build against it, so it is now marked as BROKEN;

  - The pkg-plist of db4o has been adjusted.  I'll mail the maintainer
    to suggest an update to a much more recent version.

  - I could not reproduce the GTK# error and guess this might be a
    transient error.

Can you please give the new patch a try?

Thanks!
